args:
set -euo pipefail; for name in SIFFLET_API_TOKEN SIFFLET_BACKEND_URL SIFFLET_CONFIG_INI; do value="${!name-}"; if [[ -n "$value" && "$value" == *'${'* ]]; then unset "$name"; fi; done; export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$HOME/.cargo/bin:${PATH:-}"; cfg="${SIFFLET_CONFIG_INI:-$HOME/.sifflet/config.ini}"; if [[ -f "$cfg" ]]; then eval "$(python3 - "$cfg" <<'PY'
import configparser, shlex, sys
cp = configparser.ConfigParser(); cp.read(sys.argv[1], encoding='utf-8')
app = cp['APP'] if 'APP' in cp else {}
tenant = (app.get('tenant') or '').strip()
backend_url = (app.get('backend_url') or '').strip()
token = (app.get('token') or '').strip()
def with_scheme(url):
    return url if url.startswith(('http://', 'https://')) else ('https://' + url.lstrip('/')) if url else ''
exports = []
if token:
    exports.append('export SIFFLET_API_TOKEN=' + shlex.quote(token))
url = with_scheme(backend_url) or (f'https://{tenant}.siffletdata.com/api/' if tenant else '')
if url:
    exports.append('export SIFFLET_BACKEND_URL=' + shlex.quote(url))
print('\n'.join(exports))
PY
)"; fi; exec uvx sifflet-mcp@latest
